message:
test(readme): cover 13 Column inspection methods (fd90.255 / br-bvouu)

Extends readme_serialization_compiles_and_runs to cover 13 Column
inspection methods at fp-columnar lines 961-1080 that previously had
no integration coverage:

- Column::new(dtype, values) — explicit-dtype constructor
  (Column::from_values was already partly used)
- dtype, len, is_empty
- values, value(idx) (asserted Some(&Int64(2)) at idx 1)
- iter_values (count == 3)
- to_vec
- validity (returns &ValidityMask)
- has_any_missing (false for clean Int64 col, true for col with NaN)
- all_missing (false)
- first (Some(&Int64(1))), last (Some(&Int64(3)))

Verified: 36 integration tests + 7 lib tests + 2 doctests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"frankenpandas-bplco","title":"fd90.173: add Type Coercion integration test (astype + convert_dtypes + to_numeric)","description":"fd90.74-172 follow-on. The README's 'Type Coercion and Conversion' section (lines 1001-1019) hasn't been integration-tested. It exercises:
  - series.astype(DType)
  - df.astype_column(name, DType)
  - df.astype_columns(&[(name, DType)])
  - df.convert_dtypes()
  - df.infer_objects()
  - to_numeric(&series) module-level fn

Fix: add 'readme_type_coercion_compiles_and_runs' which mirrors the example. Build a small DataFrame and series with mixed types and exercise each call. Pure additive test.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"test","created_at":"2026-04-26T17:05:39.154918944Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-26T17:08:14.644842271Z","closed_at":"2026-04-26T17:08:14.641958639Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}

+{"id":"frankenpandas-bvouu","title":"fd90.255: Cover Column inspection methods","description":"fd90.255: Cover Column inspection methods (dtype/values/value/has_any_missing/etc.).

Column has 12+ public methods at fp-columnar lines 961-1080 with only len barely covered.

Methods to cover:
- Column::new(dtype, values) — explicit-dtype constructor
- col.dtype()
- col.values() / col.value(idx) / col.iter_values()
- col.to_vec()
- col.has_any_missing(), col.all_missing()
- col.first(), col.last()
- col.validity() (returns &ValidityMask)
- col.is_empty()

Scope:
- Add a small focused test or extend an existing one with all calls.
